segments.text: Unplanned failures drain budgets and teams.

segments.label: B-roll 2 — Keeping track of user access across depa
segments.text: Keeping track of user access across departments eats up hours.

segments.label: B-roll 3 — Manual ai failure predictions grid proce
segments.text: Manual ai failure predictions grid processes take hours, every day.

segments.label: Scene 1 — Real-Time Device Monitoring
segments.text: Monitor your entire IoT fleet at a glance, with color-coded status indicators and real-time data visualizations.

segments.label: Scene 2 — Device Fleet Dashboard
segments.text: This dashboard presents a real-time overview of device health, breakouts by type, and geolocated alerts on a dynamic map.

segments.label: Scene 3 — Device Management Grid
segments.text: This grid view displays all your connected devices with key details like status, ID, and usage statistics, making bulk monitoring and management effortless.

segments.label: Scene 4 — Site Directory Overview
segments.text: This feature provides a visual directory of all enterprise sites, allowing users to quickly see site names, locations, and available action items.

segments.label: Scene 5 — Alarm Management Dashboard
segments.text: This dashboard centralizes all active and resolved alarms for your hardware fleet, categorizing them by urgency and type for rapid action.

segments.label: Scene 6 — Content Report Analytics
segments.text: The Content Report feature charts multiple quality scores like comprehensiveness, accuracy, and freshness over time, providing a clear historical perspective on content performance.

segments.label: Scene 7 — AI Predictive Analysis
segments.text: This feature delivers an AI-driven dashboard that highlights predictive equipment issues like connectivity, temperature, and part failures.

segments.label: Scene 8 — User Management Dashboard
segments.text: The dashboard provides a consolidated list of all users, displaying their roles, account status, assigned organizations, and access levels.

segments.label: Scene 9 — Air Analytics Model
segments.text: This feature visualizes air flow, temperature, and efficiency using live modeled data, helping users monitor and adjust system parameters instantly to prevent downtime and maximize operational effectiveness.

segments.label: Benefit Slide — Value Adds
segments.text: User Directory Table: With User Directory Table, your team can quickly find, review, and update any user's access in seconds. Real-Time Alert Panel: With Real-Time Alert Panel, your team can spot and act on every critical incident the moment it appears. Quick User Onboarding: With Quick User Onboarding, your team can add new hires in seconds. Energy and Cost KPIs: With Energy and Cost KPIs, your team can see exactly where energy and money go. Energy and Cost Metrics: With Energy and Cost Metrics, your team can see which devices use the most power — and which cost you extra.

segments.label: Presenter Close
segments.text: Platform turns every data point into a prevention Rheem TotalView — contact us to arrange your live demonstration.
